fields.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## TDD Requirement
Create tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh with 2 structural boundary tests (Rule 5 compliant) that FAIL RED before consumer_completeness is added to scope.md:

- test_scope_reviewer_dimension_table_count: count dimension rows in scope.md's '## Your Dimensions' table; expected 4 rows (currently 3 — RED before implementation)
- test_scope_reviewer_json_schema_key_count: count JSON dimension keys in scope.md's json schema block; expected 4 keys (currently 3 — RED before implementation)

Rule 5 compliance: these are count-based structural boundary checks, NOT body-text content assertions. They verify the structure/shape of the output contract schema.

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh following pattern of test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline.sh
2. test_scope_reviewer_dimension_table_count(): count lines matching '^| [a-z_]' in SCOPE_MD; pass if count=4, fail with actual count
3. test_scope_reviewer_json_schema_key_count(): count lines matching '"[a-z_]*":' inside the json block; pass if count=4, fail with actual count
4. chmod +x the new test file
5. Update .test-index: APPEND to line 316 (do NOT create a new entry)
   Before: plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/scope.md:tests/scripts/test-sprint-review-scope-check.sh,tests/scripts/test-isolation-rule-no-unscoped-export.sh
   After:  plugins/dso/skills/shared/docs/reviewers/scope.md:tests/scripts/test-sprint-review-scope-check.sh,tests/scripts/test-isolation-rule-no-unscoped-export.sh,tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh [test_scope_reviewer_dimension_table_count]
6. Verify bash tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh exits non-zero (RED)

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh: create (new test file)
- .test-index: modify line 316 (append to comma-separated list, add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: [ -x tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh ]
- [ ] test_scope_reviewer_dimension_table_count function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_scope_reviewer_dimension_table_count' tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh
- [ ] test_scope_reviewer_json_schema_key_count function exists
  Verify: grep -q 'test_scope_reviewer_json_schema_key_count' tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh
- [ ] .test-index has exactly 2 entries for scope.md (appended, not new entry)
  Verify: grep -c 'scope.md:' .test-index | grep -q '^2$'
- [ ] RED confirmation: test file exits non-zero before scope.md changes
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-scope-reviewer-consumer-completeness.sh; [ $? -ne 0 ]
